narrative:
Mikel Oyarzabal is a Centre-Forward for Spain, holding an overall rating of 7.51/10. This impressive score places him in the top 2% of centre-forwards at this tournament. His rating range is between 7.09 and 7.92, reflecting the impact of his match sample size.

At this World Cup, Oyarzabal has demonstrated exceptional finishing, scoring 1.196 goals per 90 minutes from an expected goals (xG) of 0.719 per 90 minutes. He averages 4.485 shots per 90 minutes, highlighting his consistent threat on goal. While his World Cup assist rate is 0.299 per 90 minutes, his club form over the last two seasons showed 0.128 assists per 90 minutes.

Oyarzabal is a crucial attacking component for his national team, with 30% of his overall rating derived from his current World Cup performances. His World Cup goal-scoring output significantly surpasses his club level, where he registered 0.459 goals per 90 minutes. Scouts and fans should closely observe his continued clinical finishing and high shot volume in Spain's remaining fixtures.
